name: hb_3_25
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Jingxing County (district_id 9) on 2025-06-30 compute and store the district-level AQI profile: mean_aqi, max_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (AQI>100, int), peak_aqi_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Examine the pollution causes affecting Jingxing County (district_id: 9) on 2025-06-30, analyzing the impact of topographical factors and emission source distribution.
